public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as ash port trade marshal.
appearance: Heat-scarred protection, ash-set layers, and house-marked gear read as survival equipment first and status second.
manner: Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a ash port trade marshal still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of ash port trade marshal in and around Ashwake Port, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ashwake Port workable through the obligations of ash port trade marshal while managing the immediate pressure of harbor ash clogging in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must hold procedure, public trust, and immediate response together when any one of them would be easier to sacrifice. Around Ashwake Port, that usually means carrying harbor ash clogging, storm-whirlpool risk, port rivalry without letting the role of ash port trade marshal visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Any task accepted from Port Factor Nemra Sootwake may turn into an escort, checkpoint, or route-control problem before the destination is reached.
Port Factor Nemra Sootwake needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through Ashwake Port.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Port Factor Nemra Sootwake as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named. In Ashwake Port, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Ash Port Factors, Great House Citadel Circle.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ashwake Port: checkpoints, barracks, patrol seams, or visible trouble-spots
encounter_context.interaction_anchor: threshold control or rapid incident response
